title: Gilded Armor CJ Edition
description: This Mod allows you to combine a Golden Core with a piece of armor to made it gilded, so that you will no longer be attacked by Piglins. This does work with any ArmorItem.
body:
**Gilded Armor CJ Edition**
---
This Mod allows you to combine a Golden Core with a piece of armor to made it gilded, so that you will no longer be attacked by Piglins. This does work with any ArmorItem. So it does also work with modded armors.

This Mod replaces my other mod, Gilded Netherite and is therefore based on it.

This Mod requires [Config API](https://modrinth.com/project/config-api/) and [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api).

Available on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gilded-armor-cj) and [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/gilded-armor-cj-edition/).

![Gilded Armor](https://github.com/Craftjakob/Gilded-Armor/blob/sources/pictures/Gilded_Armor.png?raw=true)
---

<details>
<summary>Translations</summary>

- US-English - en_us
- German | Deutsch - de_de
- Spanish | Español - es_es
</details>

---
Feel you free to use it in your Modpacks/Servers!

Please write Feedback in the comment section or on GitHub!

**MAKE SURE THAT YOU DON'T UPLOAD MY MODS ON OTHER WEBSITES. THE ONLY WAY IS TO LINK IT TO THE CURSEFORGE SITE AND DOWNLOAD IT ON CURSEFORGE. NOWHERE ELSE!**  

---

<details>
<summary>Changelog</summary>

# GILDED ARMOR VERSION 2.0.2

---
- Backported to 1.21 and 1.21.1
- Fixed Advancement title and description



# GILDED ARMOR VERSION 2.0.1

---
- **Fixed** fabric crash #thanks to DoomShin
  - id was config-api and not configapi



# GILDED ARMOR VERSION 2.0.0

---
- **Renamed** the project from Gilded Netherite to Gilded Armor
- **Updated** Icon
- **Removed** the Gilded Armor and Tools
- **Added** new mechanic to add a Golden Core to a piece of Armor, to add the makes piglins friendly effect
- **Added** Configs:
  - RenderGildedOverlay - allows you to turn off the rendering
  - DoNotRenderGildedOverlay - a list of items, which should not rendered with an overlay



# GILDED NETHERITE VERSION 1.2.2

---
### thanks again to Yenistax
- Golden Core tag is now c:materials/golden_core



# GILDED NETHERITE VERSION 1.2.1

---
### thanks to Yenistax
- Added back some tags, for crafting Enderite Armor/Tools



# GILDED NETHERITE VERSION 1.2.0

---
- Updated to 1.21
- Added datagen
- Added missing tags



GILDED NETHERITE VERSION 1.1.0
- Added Support for Fabric and NeoForge
- requires Config API and Architectury API

GILDED NETHERITE VERSION 1.0.2
1. Renamed the tooltip names
2. Fixed Trimmable Armor issue
3. Added trim models for right textures for the trim armor

GILDED NETHERITE VERSION 1.0.1
1. Updated to 1.20
2. Removed Gilded Netherite Tab
- Set the Gilded Items behind the Netherite Items (only 1.19.3+)
3. Rework of the Loot Table System
4. Added Configs
- Enable/Disable Item Tooltips
- You can configure all chances of the golden core in chests...

GILDED NETHERITE VERSION 1.0.0
### Big and Full Release
1. Rework of ModArmorMaterials Class
2. Gilded Netherite Pickaxe
- Have now the tag NEEDS_NETHERITE_TOOL
3. Changed the Creative Tab Icon from Golden Core to Gilded Netherite Chestplate
4. Change the title and description of the Gilded Netherite Armor Advancement
5. Reduced Efficiency of Gilded Netherite Tools
6. The Armor toughness is now 3.5 (+ 0.5)
7. Changed the icon to match More Bows CJ
8. New Loot Table System
9. Added Configs for
- Enable/Disable Piglin Trade Golden Core
- Enable/Disable Golden Core in Nether Bridge Chests
- Enable/Disable Golden Core in Bastion Treasure Chests
- Enable/Disable Golden Core in Bastion Hoglin Stable Chests
- Enable/Disable Golden Core in Bastion Other Chests
- Enable/Disable Golden Core in Bastion Bridge Chests
- Enable/Disable Golden Core in Runied Portal Chests
- Enable/Disable Golden Core Tooltip
10. Golden Core Chances
- Piglin Trade 7.5%
- Nether Bridge 25% (Only with correct config)
- Bastion Treasure 50% (Only with correct config)
- Bastion Hoglin Stable 20% (Only with correct config)
- Bastion Other 15% (Only with correct config)
- Bastion Bridge 10% (Only with correct config)
- Ruined Portal 0.1%
11. Added more Tooltips for Golden Core
12. My To-do list is no empty...

GILDED NETHERITE VERSION 0.9.7

2. Back ported to
- 1.19 forge 41.1.0
- 1.19.1 forge 42.0.9

- 1.19.3 forge 44.1.23

"forge:materials/golden_core"

and all other Tools/Armor

GILDED NETHERITE VERSION 0.9.5
1. Added Advancement for Golden Core

GILDED NETHERITE VERSION 0.9.4
1. REMOVED ITEMS/BLOCKS

- Gilded Netherite Ingot
2. ADDED ITEMS
- Golden Core (instead of Gilded Netherite Ingot, trade with Piglins to collect)
3. Balanced
- Armor stats
4. Updated lang files
5. Updated Forge version
1.19.4 now 45.0.40

GILDED NETHERITE VERSION 0.9.3
1. Updated Forge Version to 1.19.3 = 44.1.23 and 1.19.4 = 45.0.23
2. Updated the CreativeModeTab Inventory, because they change it and now it works!
3. For the 1.19.4 is the Armor durability multiplier updated and the Armor values.

GILDED NETHERITE VERSION 0.9.2
1. Gilded Netherite Block is now Lava resistance!
2. The Armor Tier is from GILDED_NETHERITE_INGOT changed to GILDED_NETHERITE
3. Updated lang files
4. Fixed Beacon payment item
5. Updated Forge version
1.19.1 now 42.0.9

GILDED NETHERITE VERSION 0.9.1

GILDED NETHERITE VERSION 0.9
1. This Mod is for forge version 1.19-41.0.100
2. Updated to 1.19.1 forge  version 42.0.1+
